steps: Verify all visible intake and research-path assertions
Run the required canonical managed restart persistence step
expected: The durable investigative mission survives the canonical managed restart and remains visible in the live browser.
actual: All browser assertions and refresh persistence passed, but the non-elevated QA child process could not terminate the verified runtime PID: taskkill returned Access denied.
apiOrDbEvidence: The runtime was healthy and repository-associated at preflight; the failure was limited to Windows process-control permission during restart.
